:tags main11  
:scriptA white_line_tile lt-s 
:scriptB arrow_line_tile lt-s 
:scriptC emptywreck 0.5 movey 
:scriptD arrow_alt_tile lt-s 
:scriptF 50 %chance if vending_empty then 
:scriptG lot_decor 
:scriptH floor_designation

:off 2 0
